branches.name: plus
branches.changelog:
v1.4.1 (plus)

Linux:
- Fixed `_restart` crash by implementing new engine restart method
- Supported dedicated server engine build (engine_i486.so)

Engine:
- Fixed out of bounds access in SV_CreateResourceList (sound precache crash)
- Fixed another heap corruption during svc_deltapacketentities parsing with bad connection
- Added `unalias`, `unaliasall` commands
- Added `cl_showpos` cvar

ServerBrowser:
- Applied some fixes to multigamedir feature
